privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At UnlockHub we take your privacy seriously. This screen is a summary of our policy. You can read the full version at the link below.
privacy.data_collected_body: We collect your email, username, game stats and achievements linked to the platforms you connect (Steam, RetroAchievements). We never sell your data to third parties.
privacy.ads_body: The app displays ads through Google AdMob. AdMob may use device identifiers to show you relevant ads, subject to your consent. You can manage your preferences in your device settings.
privacy.contact_body: If you have questions about your privacy or want to exercise your GDPR rights (access, rectification, deletion), write to us at privacy@unlockhub.app.
privacy.full_policy_label: Open the full privacy policy in the browser

psn.title: Link PlayStation
psn.description: To connect your PSN account you need your NPSSO token. Follow these steps:
psn.step1: 1. Open a browser and sign in to PlayStation.
psn.step3: 3. Copy the value of the «npsso» field and paste it below.
psn.npsso_placeholder: Paste your NPSSO token here (64+ characters)
psn.npsso_hint: The NPSSO token obtained from ca.account.sony.com
psn.submit_label: Submit your NPSSO token to link your PlayStation account
psn.error_empty: The NPSSO token cannot be empty.
psn.error_invalid: The NPSSO token appears invalid. Make sure you copied it correctly.
psn.privacy_note: Your NPSSO token is used only to authenticate you. It is encrypted with AES-256 and never shared with third parties.
psn.unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink your PlayStation account? Sync data will be removed.

xbox.title: Link Xbox
xbox.description: Connect your Xbox Live account with your Microsoft account. You'll be redirected to Microsoft login.
xbox.submit_label: Open browser to authenticate with your Microsoft account and link Xbox
xbox.error_failed: Could not link your Xbox account. Please try again.
xbox.privacy_note: Only a Microsoft refresh token is stored, encrypted with AES-256. We never access your Microsoft password.
xbox.unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink your Xbox account? Sync data will be removed.

steam.title: Link Steam
steam.description: Connect your Steam account using your SteamID64 and a Steam API key.
steam.step1: 1. Go to steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey and sign in.
steam.step2: 2. Create an API key with any domain name.
steam.step3: 3. Your SteamID64 appears on your Steam profile (17 digits).
steam.steam_id_hint: The 17-digit numeric ID from your Steam profile
steam.api_key_placeholder: Paste your Steam API Key here
steam.api_key_hint: The API key obtained at steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey
steam.submit_label: Submit your credentials to link your Steam account
steam.error_invalid: Could not link Steam. Check that your SteamID64 and API key are correct.
steam.error_already_linked: You already have a Steam account linked.
steam.privacy_note: Your API key is encrypted with AES-256 and never shared with third parties. It is only used to sync your achievements.
steam.unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink your Steam account? Sync data will be removed.

ra.title: Link RetroAchievements
ra.description: Connect your RetroAchievements account using your username and API key.
ra.step2: 2. Go to Settings → Keys to get your Web API Key.
ra.step3: 3. Enter your username and paste your API key below.
ra.username_hint: The username you use on retroachievements.org
ra.api_key_placeholder: Paste your Web API Key here
ra.submit_label: Submit your credentials to link your RetroAchievements account
ra.error_invalid: Could not link RetroAchievements. Check that your username and API key are correct.
ra.error_already_linked: You already have a RetroAchievements account linked.
ra.privacy_note: Your API key is encrypted with AES-256 and never shared with third parties. It is only used to sync your achievements.
ra.unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink your RetroAchievements account? Sync data will be removed.
